---
title: "Multi-Model Comparison"
subtitle: "Ocean Biogeochemical Model Analysis (${timestamp})"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    theme:
      - journal
      - custom.scss
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 7
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

# Global Summary

Comparison of global ecosystem metrics across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_global.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_global_normalized.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_global_anompct.png)

:::

# Regional and Monthly Patterns

## Total Chlorophyll

Regional and monthly total chlorophyll comparison.

![](mm_tchl.png)

## pCO₂

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_pco2.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_pco2_anom.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_pco2_anompct.png)

:::

# Plankton Functional Types

Comparison of phytoplankton and zooplankton biomass across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_pfts.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_pfts_normalized.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_pfts_anompct.png)

:::

## PPT by PFT

Primary production broken down by phytoplankton functional type.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_ppt_by_pft.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_ppt_by_pft_normalized.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_ppt_by_pft_anompct.png)

:::

# Nutrients

Comparison of nutrient concentrations across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_nutrients.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_nutrients_anom.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_nutrients_anompct.png)

:::

# Physical Environment

Comparison of physical variables across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_physics.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_physics_anom.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_physics_anompct.png)

:::

# Derived Ecosystem Variables

Comparison of derived ecosystem variables across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_derived.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_derived_normalized.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_derived_anompct.png)

:::

${DERIVED_SECTION}

# Organic Matter Pools

Comparison of dissolved and particulate organic carbon pools across models.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_organic_matter.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_organic_matter_normalized.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_organic_matter_anompct.png)

:::

# Benthic / Deep Ocean

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Normal

![](mm_benthic.png)

## Anomaly

![](mm_benthic_anom.png)

## Anomaly %

![](mm_benthic_anompct.png)

:::

---

# Spatial Maps

${MODEL_MAPS}

---

# Vertical Transects

## Nutrients

### Atlantic (35°W) - Nutrients

![](mm_transect_atlantic_nutrients.png)

### Pacific (170°W) - Nutrients

![](mm_transect_pacific_nutrients.png)

## PFTs

### Atlantic (35°W) - PFTs

![](mm_transect_atlantic_pfts.png)

### Pacific (170°W) - PFTs

![](mm_transect_pacific_pfts.png)

---

# Configuration Comparison

Differences in model configuration files.

## SetUpData Configuration

${SETUPDATA_COMPARISON}

## Namelist Comparison (namelist.trc.sms)

${NAMELIST_COMPARISON}

---

# Data Sources

:::{.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Observational Data References

- **Chlorophyll**: OCCCI version 5 monthly climatology
- **Primary Production & CaCO₃**: [Laufkötter et al. (2016)](https://bg.copernicus.org/articles/13/4111/2016/)
- **Export Production**: [Weber et al. (2024)](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1748-9326/ad1e7f)
- **Plankton Biomass**: [Laufkötter et al. (2016)](https://bg.copernicus.org/articles/13/4111/2016/); [Henschke et al. (2021)](https://bg.copernicus.org/articles/18/1291/2021/) (jellyfish)
- **Nutrients**: [World Ocean Atlas 2018](https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/access/metadata/landing-page/bin/iso?id=gov.noaa.nodc:NCEI-WOA18)
- **pCO₂**: [Global Carbon Budget 2022](https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/14/4811/2022/)
- **Temperature & Salinity**: WOA18 (2005-2018 period)
:::
